Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action For Minor, Drake Stetler
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor, Drake Stetler.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Erik L. Peterson, Esq. appeared with petitioner Amanda Stetler, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Drake Stetler, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Ms. Stetler was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Stetler Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on August 31, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $33,333.33.
Attorney Fees - $6,923.01.
Costs - $5,640.96.

The net balance of $20,769.36 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 8420 N. Friant Road, Fresno, CA 93720. Telephone: 559-451-2260. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to October 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.
